market_context: With Nifty in a strong uptrend (+4.4%, ADX 25, VIX 12.7), demand zone BUY setups are preferred. Only 2 setups were detected. RELIANCE BUY aligns with the trending_up regime and yesterday's learnings to focus on demand zones, while INFY SELL is counter-trend. Neither setup is ideal — RELIANCE has a low zone score (44) and INFY is a SELL in an uptrend — but per yesterday's learnings we should lower thresholds in this regime.

regime.description: ADX=25.0 strong uptrend (Nifty +4.4%). Focus on demand zones aligned with trend.

reasoning: BUY setup aligned with strong trending_up market regime (Nifty +4.4%, ADX 25)
RELIANCE is a heavyweight index mover likely benefiting from broad rally momentum

R:R ratio of 3.0 provides favorable risk-reward even with moderate win probability

top10_recommendations.entry_advice: Place limit order at 1325 with tight stop at 1318.67. Wait for a bullish confirmation candle (green 15-min close above 1326) before committing full size. Consider half-position given low zone score.

reasoning: High zone score (53/60) with excellent technical characteristics — gap departure, instant reversal, pristine zone
